top_signals.title: AI is changing older workers' careers, research finds — here's how
top_signals.summary: AI may either prompt some older workers to leave their jobs or help make their roles more efficient, research finds. Here's which careers may be most affected.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
